title: MekaMod
description: Adds New Stuff to Mekanism: Automation
body:
# ⚙️ Features
 

Includes 4 unique tiers of Automator Cores. These are essential crafting components for machinery and automation upgrades within my pack.

A new Professional Villager specialized in Nuclear Materials.



# 🚀 Purpose

 
This mod is specifically designed to bridge the gap between resource gathering and automated production for my Modpack called "Mekanism: Automation". While created for this specific modpack, it can be used in any technical environment.
